message:
chore(lints): silence question_mark clippy lint + rustfmt identity helper

Two clean-up pieces surfaced by `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets
-- -D warnings` after the #105 fixes landed:

- crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/cache.rs:789 — `if let Some(entry) = ...
  else { return None }` replaced with a plain `?` on `cache.get_mut`.
  Semantically identical; narrower scope for the `entry` binding.
- crates/mcp-agent-mail-tools/src/identity.rs — rustfmt-only reflow of
  the `asupersync::time::sleep(...)` call in the new
  `persist_agent_registration_token_with_retry` helper so `cargo fmt
  --check` stays green on this crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
